description_long: This object represents a child pedestrian, depicted with elongated and stylized proportions. The figure appears slender, with long limbs and a narrow torso, suggesting a youthful build. The arms and legs are thin and angular, with the arms extending downward and the legs close together. The head is small and rounded, positioned atop a long neck, and there are no visible facial features or detailed anatomical elements. The surface is smooth and uniform, with a glossy finish that reflects light subtly. The overall form is abstract, lacking fine details such as fingers, facial features, or realistic clothing folds.
description: A stylized, elongated child pedestrian figure with smooth, glossy surfaces and minimal anatomical detail.
description_view_0: This view shows the child from a three-quarter angle, highlighting the long, thin limbs and the abstract, smooth body shape.
description_view_1: A side profile view, emphasizing the extreme slenderness and the angular posture of the figure.
description_view_2: A close-up of the torso and upper leg area, showing the smooth, uninterrupted surface and lack of detailed features.
description_view_3: A rear or oblique view, revealing the back and the extended limbs, with the head and body appearing narrow and elongated.
attribute_clothing_type: form-fitting bodysuit with no visible separate garments or accessories
attribute_hairstyle: short, close-cropped hair with no distinct styling
